ip_outcome_note: Card name is explicit: 'Vegeta.' Special Trait: Saiyan. Union Force Android/Cell Saga era designation. 'Full Power' refers to Vegeta's 'Full Power Super Saiyan' training arc during the Cell Games preparation. Golden spiked hair + Saiyan battle armor are canonical Vegeta SSJ visual identifiers.

trivia_bullets.text: Union Force (DBS-B02, November 2017) is the second main booster. Its green axis is the Android/Cell Saga with Cell's Union-Absorb as flagship mechanic. 'Full Power Vegeta' references Vegeta's Android Saga arc: after allowing Cell to absorb Android 18 and achieve perfect form, Vegeta trained to a 'Full Power Super Saiyan' state in preparation for the Cell Games.
sources: WebSearch: DBS official Union Force set notes
Dragon Ball Wiki: Cell Games Saga

trivia_bullets.text: Vegeta's 'Full Power' arc carries narrative ambivalence: his peak power in this arc was also the moment his pride cost the world the most — his decision to let Cell absorb Android 18 was a pride-driven choice that enabled Cell's perfect form and nearly ended human civilization. The card title's framing of 'Full Power' carries that weight.

Battle card, Green, Cost 3, Power 15000, Combo Power 5000, Rare. On-play effect: KO any number of opponent's Battle Cards with individual cost 2 or less, as long as their combined cost totals 3 or less. A board-clear entry effect efficient at sweeping small-unit boards. Note: vision flagged blue-magic (color-read from low-res image); TCG database confirms the card is Green element.

BT2-076 is the only Rare in the green subset of Union Force from the Saiyan trait group — the adjacent BT2-075 Son Gohan is Common. Vegeta's Rare designation reflects the card's stronger on-play removal utility versus Gohan's cost-reduction value trigger.
sources: WebSearch: Bleeding Cool Union Force checklist
